title: Shareholder Spotlight: Esther Koezuna
summary: BSNC shareholder Esther Koezuna serves as the corporation’s Anchorage office receptionist. In addition to serving as the first individual people interact with at BSNC, Koezuna is a traditional culture-bearer. She grew up in the King Island community of Nome and today, regularly shares her traditiona...

title: Forty-one new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta March 22
summary: On March 22, YKHC reports forty-one new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: Mapping for the Future
summary: The Alaska Coastal Mapping Initiative is on a mission to create a seamless modern map of the Alaska coast by 2030. The post Mapping for the Future appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
